paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05 as of July 17, with a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over the last 20 sessions. There has been one new news article in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an article from simplywall.st discussing the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns and the completion of a $375 million convertibles deal. This news may be driving current interest in the company.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K form on July 15 detailing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form on July 13 disclosing Miles Everson's resignation. There has also been one Form 4 filing in the feed, with 19 proxy solicitation filings and no Form 144 filings.
